title: Satay Peanut Sauce Noodles
description: A Southeast Asian-inspired noodle dish with a rich, savory peanut sauce and the flavors of satay.
instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a blender or food processor, combine peanuts, coconut milk, soy sauce, honey, garlic, and ginger. Blend until smooth.
Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add the peanut sauce mixture to the saucepan and cook, stirring constantly, for 2-3 minutes.
Add the cooked noodles to the saucepan and toss to combine with the peanut sauce.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes or until the noodles are well coated.
Stir in chopped cilantro and cook for 1 minute.
Serve hot, garnished with lime wedges.
